summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of Texas BHA website - Team member categories verification, all pages, navigation, and admin panel functionality
passed_tests: GET /api/team - Rachel Adams verified as 'Marketing Chair'
GET /api/team - Michael Chang verified as 'Expansion Chair'
Homepage loads with 'EST. 2019' in hero section
Navigation bar works - all links functional (Home, Committees dropdown, Gallery, Newsletter, Opportunities, Team, Contact, Admin)
Google Calendar icon visible in navbar
Gallery page loads with Instagram section linking to https://www.instagram.com/tx_bha/
Expansion/Chapters page loads with Texas map - correctly NO 'Established 2019' text
Team page updated to show all 4 categories (Executive Board, Marketing Chair, Expansion Chair, Committee Leads)
Consulting page loads with horizontal scrolling project sections
Admin login works with admin@texasbha.org / TexasBHA2024!
Admin dashboard loads and shows content management tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team.js was fixed to display all 4 team member categories (Executive Board, Marketing Chair, Expansion Chair, Committee Leads). Rachel Adams and Michael Chang have been correctly updated to their respective new categories via API. All navigation, pages, and admin functionality working correctly.
fix_applied: Fixed Team.js to render all team member categories - added sections for Marketing Chair and Expansion Chair, and properly render Committee Leads section that was defined but not displayed.
